title: bind style merge not as expected

comments.body: I encountered the same issue with style binding merge order in Vue 2.7.x. Found this helpful resource that explains the root cause: https://vuestyling.dev/articles/bind-style-merge-binding-order It walks through how the style merge algorithm differs between Vue 2 and Vue 3.

body:
### Version
2.7.14

### Reproduction link
[codesandbox.io](https://codesandbox.io/s/style-merge-9hltuv)







### Steps to reproduce

click mStyle button twice

### What is expected?
show red border-right and blue border-bottom

### What is actually happening?
only show red border-right. is not similar as setAttribute but vue3 is similar like setAttribute

---
is this a bug?
